category_sources: source_facts.description identifies an ncurses-based file manager with vi-like keybindings; official homepage describes a curses file manager.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and navigation use Vifm.
docs_sources: Official Vifm site navigation links to the Documentation page at /docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/vim/vim; per instructions repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names ncurses file manager and vi-like keybindings; official homepage lists file-management features.
